name: Black Soldier Ant Buggy
description: The late-game upgrade to the red ant buggy. It hatches from 1 Black Soldier Ant Egg, 2 Pinecone Piece, 3 Pine Needle, and 2 Chrysalis Leather, keeping the hauling and recruiting utility while adding a corrosive Tang attack for area control.
behavior: It moves like a heavier, safer version of the red ant buggy. It still bites and charges to pin targets in place, but now it also cuts routes with corrosion, forcing fights to happen around its puddles instead of only in front of its jaws.
interactionWithPlayer: It keeps the hauling, mounted building, and throwing utility, but its true upgrade is Tang Throw: a short-range artillery tool that creates a corrosive zone in front of the buggy without sacrificing mobility.
interactionWithCreatures: Black ants stay passive toward it unless there is friendly fire, and a recruited Black Worker Ant fights beside the mount. Against everything else it behaves like a pressure mount: sturdier than the red version and always leaving dangerous ground behind each advance.
strategy: Use it when route control and combat matter at the same time. Recruit a black worker for free extra pressure, use Tang Throw to close lanes or cover a retreat, and lean on its extra toughness in places where the red buggy would start to crumble.
respawnInfo: Incubation: 12 hours inside the Hatchery. Only one buggy can be active at a time. If you do not revive it within 90 seconds, it returns to its nest and becomes unavailable for 5 minutes.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite, mandible combo, charge, and a short-range corrosive Tang lob.

inflicts: Its basic attacks deal chopping damage while the special shot leaves Tang corrosion.
specialTraits: Can transport 12 hauling objects or 1 egg.
Throws Tang and leaves a short corrosive puddle.

abilities.name: Recruit Black Worker Ant
abilities.description: Near a Black Worker Ant, it forces the ant to serve the player. The worker follows the mount and fights beside it. Costs 2 stamina bars.

abilities.name: Tang Throw
abilities.description: Uses the black ant Tang attack to lob a short corrosive projectile that leaves an affected area behind.

abilities.name: Mandible Bite
abilities.description: A short reliable attack used to keep pressure up.

abilities.name: Mandible Combo
abilities.description: A series of chained hits once the victim stays in front of the mount.

abilities.name: Heavy Charge
abilities.description: A sturdier charge than the red buggy version, used to open or finish fights while Tang blocks the retreat.
